description: Document Preservation and Digitization — manages document scanning, indexing, microfilm/digital conversion, and long-term archival of recorded instruments

hard_stops.label: Image Quality Below Standard
hard_stops.logic: Scanned image resolution or legibility falls below the minimum archival standard (300 DPI, ISO 19005 PDF/A) — rescan required

hard_stops.label: Index Data Missing
hard_stops.logic: Scanned document does not have complete index data (instrument number, recording date, document type, parties) — cannot be added to searchable archive

soft_flags.label: Deteriorating Source Document
soft_flags.logic: Original document shows signs of deterioration (fading ink, brittleness, water damage) — prioritize preservation scanning
